title: Dionysia bornmuelleri
intro: Dionysia bornmuelleri, also known as Bornmueller's dionysia, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Dionysia bornmuelleri include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Bornmueller's dionysia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
